paper_title: Genome-Wide Analysis of Glycoside Hydrolase Family 1 β-glucosidase Genes in Brassica rapa and Their Potential Role in Pollen Development

methods.method_name: Phylogenetic and Gene Structure Analysis of BrBGLUs
methods.description: This method involves the phylogenetic analysis of BrBGLU and AtBGLU genes to understand their evolutionary relationships and gene structure analysis to explore exon-intron organization patterns.

steps.description: HMM searching was performed by using all of the putative protein sequences of the Arabidopsis genome (ARAPORT11) as queries.
steps.searchable_summary: perform HMM search on Arabidopsis genome to obtain AtBGLU genes

steps.description: The 64 BrBGLUs and 48 AtBGLUs protein sequences were aligned using ClustaX2.
steps.searchable_summary: align BrBGLU and AtBGLU protein sequences using ClustaX2

steps.description: An unrooted phylogenetic tree was constructed for the 64 BrBGLUs and 48 AtBGLUs, using the NJ method in MEGA6 with a Poisson model.
steps.searchable_summary: construct unrooted phylogenetic tree using NJ method in MEGA6

steps.description: The gene structures of the BrBGLUs were analyzed on the basis of exon-intron organization, using GSDS 2.0.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze exon-intron organization of BrBGLUs using GSDS 2.0

methods.method_name: Analysis of the Putative Functions of BrBGLU10/AtBGLU20 in Pollen Development
methods.description: This method investigates the expression patterns and potential roles of BrBGLU10 and AtBGLU20 in pollen development through RT-PCR, co-expression analysis, and gene knockdown experiments.

steps.description: RT-PCR was conducted to confirm the expression patterns of BrBGLU10 and AtBGLU20.
steps.searchable_summary: perform RT-PCR to analyze expression patterns of BrBGLU10 and AtBGLU20

steps.description: GO enrichment analysis of genes co-expressed with BrBGLU10 and AtBGLU20 was conducted.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct GO enrichment analysis for co-expressed genes

steps.description: Knockdown mutants of AtBGLU20 were generated by introducing antisense constructs under the control of the CaMV35S promoter.
steps.searchable_summary: generate AtBGLU20 knockdown mutants using antisense constructs
